properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When my way groweth drear, Precious Lord, linger near, When my life is almost gone; Hear my cry, hear my call, Hold my hand, lest I fall, Take my hand precious Lord, lead me Home.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Precious Lord, take my hand, Lead me on, let me stand, I am tired, I am weak, I am worn; Through the storm, through the night, Lead me on to the Light, Take my hand, precious Lord, lead me Home.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When the shadows appear, And the night draweth near, And the day is past and gone; At the river I stand, Guide my feet, hold my hand, Take my hand, precious Lord, lead me Home.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Nearing life-journey’s end Be my guide, be my friend, Give me strength, Lord to overcome; I’ll not go all alone, For by grace, I’m Thine own; Take my hand, precious Lord, lead me Home.
